name: Awesome Mix Tape
short_description: Struggle with obsolete tech to load up a growing mixtape of quirky micro-games. Play, discover, repeat!
detailed_description:
Relive the charm of retro gaming – with all its clunky frustrations!
Awesome Mix Tape is a growing collection of bite-sized, single-mechanic games packed into one nostalgic experience. Think of it as your personal mixtape – but instead of music, it’s a playlist of fun, quirky, colourful micro-games.

🎮 What’s Inside?

  • A variety of fast, simple, and addictive games – perfect for quick sessions

  • Challenges that range from fun and casual to experimental prototypes

  • Ongoing free updates with brand-new micro-games

📼 Why “Mix Tape”?
Inspired by the days of cassettes and classic gaming, Awesome Mix Tape brings back that feeling of discovery. Each game is a surprise – something new to try every time you launch.

Install once, keep it forever – and watch your collection grow!
